sections.intent: Introduction to Aalto University: What is it about?

slides.intent: Introduce the topic of Aalto University and set expectations for the presentation.
slides.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University is a leading institution in Finland focused on educating future thought-leaders through interdisciplinary collaboration. without reducing readability.
mustInclude: Aalto University is a leading institution in Finland focused on educating future thought-leaders through interdisciplinary collaboration.
slides.workingTitle: Welcome to Aalto University: An Introduction

slides.intent: Explain the structure and educational offerings of Aalto University.
slides.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, Chemical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Science, fostering creative sustainability and innovation. without reducing readability.
mustInclude: Aalto University operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, Chemical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Science, fostering creative sustainability and innovation.
slides.workingTitle: Structure and Schools: A Hub for Innovation

slides.intent: Summarize key takeaways and encourage further engagement with Aalto University.
slides.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University offers diverse opportunities for learning, research, and events that cater to a wide range of interests and backgrounds. without reducing readability.
mustInclude: Aalto University offers diverse opportunities for learning, research, and events that cater to a wide range of interests and backgrounds.

sections.title: Approved outline
